name: Giveaway Stop
description: Stop active giveaways across all channels in the current server.
author: Kiodium

defaults.descriptionTemplate: Stopped **{count}** active giveaway(s) across all channels.
defaults.plainTextTemplate: Stopped {count} active giveaway(s) across all channels.
defaults.noneMessage: No active giveaways found in this server.
defaults.permissionMessage: You need Manage Server permission to stop giveaways.
